workload: lexical rebuild and semantic catch-up control-plane sizing for a large agent-session host
proof_scope: This is not a wall-clock speedup claim.
The artifact freezes planner choices against current defaults for a synthetic 64-core, 256GiB-class host.
Live indexing controllers remain on current conservative defaults until a later bead explicitly wires this advisory plan into execution.
fallback_trigger: If /sys CPU package/core topology cannot be parsed, status JSON reports fallback_active=true and the planner preserves current shard, merge, page-prep, cache, and inflight defaults.
